dashboard.label: CAM — Certificate Planner
dashboard.description: Quantum-vulnerable certificates ranked by expiry runway.

search.query: | index=crypto_pki sourcetype=cam:cert | stats dc(subject) as count
| index=crypto_pki sourcetype=cam:cert | where expiry < 30 | stats count
| index=crypto_pki sourcetype=cam:cert | stats count by alg
| index=crypto_pki sourcetype=cam:cert | eval urgency=case(expiry<30,"renew",expiry<90,"plan",urgency="monitor","monitor",1=1,"done") | sort expiry | table subject, alg, bits, expiry, issuer, urgency
